name: Virgilia
description: She was the previous Endless Witch before Beatrice, and was also her teacher. Her new name (having passed her old one to her student) comes from the Divine Comedy character Virgil, who guides Dante through Hell and Purgatory to Beatrice, who is his guide through Heaven. She is a silver-haired witch with great powers, despite surrendering most of them to Beatrice with the title of the "Endless Witch". name: Wazaemon
description: __Height:__ 198 cm One of the Seven Colossi—Unique Monsters that inhabit the world of Shangri-La Frontier. He is an peerless hero who ceaselessly stands guard over the grave of his beloved, who passed away in the distant past. Possessing multiple attacks capable of instantly killing players, he boasts a strength that defies all logic. Ten minutes after combat begins, he summons a horse-shaped robot known as Kirin.

name: Acerola
description: Acerola is a character appearing in the Sun & Moon series. Acerola is a little girl, who has purple hair and purple eyes. She wears a patchy dress of black, dark purple, and light purple, with two ribbons coming from her back, a gold arm band on her left forearm and light purple sandals. Her hair is a rather messy short bob with her bangs collected in a small ponytail, just above her forehead with a golden clover-shaped badge.

description: Chicchi is the first Spirit Guts encounters as a young man and consequently, his first encounter with the supernatural. Chicchi is a Spirit of a flower in a small prison, and was always alone until she met Guts. Its never revealed if she was part of a dream or real.
